Faults.message:
We're sorry about the power cut in the area. The power cut is affecting some properties in the area shown on the map, but not all. This is why you may notice some of your neighbours have power, but you don't. It is normal to see 1 in 3 homes affected. We are working with our engineers to fix the problem as quickly as possible, and well keep you updated here on PowerTrack.

Engineers have arrived in the area. They are working hard to fix the problem and will get your power back on as quickly as possible. At this stage, we're aiming to have your power back on by 20:00 12/07/2026. If this changes, we'll let you know.

The power cut has been caused by a fault on our underground network. Issues like this do happen, and our engineers are very experienced at fixing them. Often, power can be restored quickly with a simple reset or by replacing a fuse at a nearby substation. If the problem is more complicated, repairs may take a little longer but our teams will keep working until everything is safely back up and running. Well keep you updated along the way.

If you need more information, please send us a message on Whatsapp or call us on 105 and quote reference 'TQ1099'

Faults.message: Were carrying out essential work on our electricity network in your area today, and our engineers have temporarily turned the power off so this work can be done safely. This work helps make sure the electricity supply to your home or business remains safe and reliable. Depending on the area, this work could include repairs or upgrades to the network, tree cutting near overhead power lines, or connecting new customers to the electricity network.Power will be restored as quickly as possible, and well keep you updated here on Power Track. Your letter provides more details about the specific reason for todays planned power cut, but if you need to speak to us, please call us on 105 or send us a message on Facebook or send us a message on Whatsapp or with reference '253303'.

If the problem is more complicated, repairs may take a little longer but our teams will keep working until everything is safely back up and running. Well keep you updated along the way.

If you need more information, please send us a message on Whatsapp or call us on 105 and quote reference 'TQ2314'
Faults.name: DT3 & DT4 Areas

Faults.message: Were carrying out essential work on our electricity network in your area today, and our engineers have temporarily turned the power off so this work can be done safely. This work helps make sure the electricity supply to your home or business remains safe and reliable. Depending on the area, this work could include repairs or upgrades to the network, tree cutting near overhead power lines, or connecting new customers to the electricity network.Power will be restored as quickly as possible, and well keep you updated here on Power Track. Your letter provides more details about the specific reason for todays planned power cut, but if you need to speak to us, please call us on 105 or send us a message on Facebook or send us a message on Whatsapp or with reference '252625'.
Faults.name: PH26 Area
